title: Kinda fun i guess
description: This mod adds 3 features, A Railgun type of Instant killing bow, A Stick which when named Zeus can spawn thunder with explosion :O, firecharge as projectile which fireball explosion can be set from the chat :)
body:
Its a project I did for fun, it includes 3 features
1. Instant killing railgun type of bow.
2. Fire Charges as project which fireball explosionc is variable that can be set from the chat.
3. A Stick when renamed "Zeus" can strike thunder and explosion TO STRIKE FEAR IN YOUR ENEMIES >:)
